fields.name: Confirmation
fields.fieldText:
{!Thanks}


"{!TitlePlus.value}" has been posted.

fields.name: ReceipentTypeDetails
fields.fieldText: Relationship to the person you are posting for.

fields.name: Dedication
fields.fieldText:
Note: Only Prayers and Thank You's can have dedications.   

Dedications are optional if a post is 'Shared With Neighbours' but required if a post is private.

Dedications can be for either a person or Organization / Household but not both.

fields.name: Double
fields.fieldText: You cannot dedicate to a person AND an organization / Household. Please select 1 only.

fields.name: Warning
fields.fieldText: You can only add a dedication to 'Prayer's and 'Thank You's.

fields.name: DedicationRequiredMsg
fields.fieldText:
To post a private Prayer or Thank You, you must select a person that it's 'Dedicated To'.

Otherwise, select 'Share With Neighbours' to make the post public.

fields.name: PostSettings
fields.fieldText:
Post Sharing

If you are comfortable, sharing your post publicly is a great way to foster community and connection. Additionally, offering to share on social helps shine our light into the world. (Matt 5:14-16)

validationRule.errorMessage: A post must be dedicated to someone if it is to remain private otherwise there is no one to delivery the message to.

fields.name: Permission_to_Share_on_Social_Media
fields.fieldText: Permission to Share on Social Media
